2603.24239.title: DVM: Real-Time Kernel Generation for Dynamic AI Models
2603.24239.paper_summary: Dynamism is common in AI computation, e.g., the dynamic tensor shapes and the dynamic control flows in models. Due to the long compilation time, existing runtime compilation damages the model efficiency, while the offline compilers either suffer from the long compilation time and device memory footprint to cover all the possible execution instances of a dynamic model, or sacrifice optimization opportunities for usability. In this paper, we rethink the feasibility of runtime compilation for dynamic models and identify that the key for it to work is to speed up the compilation or hide the compilation overhead. To do this, we propose a real-time compiler, DVM. In DVM, we design a runtime operator compiler based on a bytecode virtual machine to perform effective and efficient compilation for each dynamic operator instance given its input. Specifically, instead of compiling programs into machine code, we encode the operator program into bytecode on the CPU and decode the bytecode into virtual instructions for direct execution on the NPU. Based on the runtime operator compiler, we further propose an operator fuser, which performs symbol-deduction-based fusion on static graphs and runtime fusion on dynamic graphs. Both pattern- and stacking-based fusion are supported to increase fusion opportunities. Evaluation on operators, subgraphs, and models shows that, compared with TorchInductor, PyTorch-eager and MindSpore-graph-O0, we are up to 11.77$\times$ better in terms of the operator/model efficiency and up to 5 orders of magnitude faster in terms of the maximum compilation time.
2603.24239.paper_summary_zh: 動態性在人工智慧計算中是常見的，例如，模型中的動態張量形狀和動態控制流。由於長時間的編譯，現有的運行時編譯會損害模型效率，而離線編譯器則要麼因為需要長時間編譯和設備內存佔用來涵蓋動態模型的所有可能執行實例而受限，要麼為了可用性而犧牲優化機會。在本文中，我們重新思考了動態模型的運行時編譯的可行性，並確定其有效運作的關鍵在於加速編譯或隱藏編譯開銷。為此，我們提出了一個實時編譯器DVM。在DVM中，我們設計了一個基於字節碼虛擬機的運行時操作符編譯器，為每個動態操作符實例根據其輸入執行有效且高效的編譯。具體而言，我們不是將程式編譯成機器碼，而是將操作符程式編碼為CPU上的字節碼，並將字節碼解碼為虛擬指令以便在NPU上直接執行。基於運行時操作符編譯器，我們進一步提出了一個操作符融合器，該融合器在靜態圖上執行基於符號推導的融合，並在動態圖上執行運行時融合。支持基於模式和堆疊的融合以增加融合機會。對操作符、子圖和模型的評估顯示，與TorchInductor、PyTorch-eager和MindSpore-graph-O0相比，在操作符/模型效率方面，我們的表現提高了最多11.77$\times$，而在最大編譯時間方面快了最多5個數量級。
2603.24239.author: Jingzhi Fang et.al.
2603.24239.authors: Jingzhi Fang, Xiong Gao, Renwei Zhang, Zichun Ye, Lei Chen, Jie Zhao, Chengnuo Huang, Hui Xu, Xuefeng Jin
